news.t: Themes ETFs Launch with Expense Ratios 40% Below the Category Average

holdings.infoBox: CLOD is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are CrowdStrike Holdings stock at 6.50%, Palo Alto Networks at 6.21%, Oracle at 4.96%, AppLovin at 4.69%, and ServiceNow at 4.28%.

overview.description: The Themes Cloud Computing ETF (CLOD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Cloud Technology index. The fund is passively managed, tracking an index comprised of firms in the cloud computing industry in developed markets. CLOD was launched on Dec 13, 2023 and is issued by Themes.

data.title: Themes ETFs Launch with Expense Ratios 40% Below the Category Average
data.text: Priced at 0.35%, over 40% below the average expense ratio charged by other thematic funds, Themes ETFs seeks to provide investors with targeted thematic exposure at low costs.1 NEW YORK , Dec. 8, 2023...
